description: Get all available car brands from FIPE API.

returns.description: List of car brands with their codes and names

description: Search for car models and prices by brand name.

brand_name.description: The car brand name to search for (e.g., "Toyota", "Honda", "Ford")

returns.description: Car models with current market prices from FIPE database

description: Get vehicles by type (cars, motorcycles, trucks).

vehicle_type.description: Type of vehicles to fetch ("carros"/"cars", "motos"/"motorcycles", "caminhoes"/"trucks"). Default: "carros"

returns.description: List of vehicle brands for the specified type
